challenge.title: Korak 2
challenge.description: Sledeće, dodajte console.log() na sekvencu karaktera "Original input:".

hooks.beforeEach:
const spy = __helpers.spyOn(console, 'log');
const getLogs = () => spy.calls.map(call => call?.[0]);

tests.text: Treba da napišete niz slova "Original input:" u konzolu.

challengeFiles.name: script
